system.kernel.disable-exception-chain-va.anticheat_details: Disabling SEH chain validation changes a kernel-observed exploit mitigation and may be interpreted as hostile tampering by anti-cheat integrity checks.

policy.system.enable-virtualization.anticheat_details: Changing virtualization and VBS posture can affect kernel integrity surfaces and compatibility with some anti-cheat stacks.

power.disable-power-throttling.anticheat_details: This is primarily a power-management change and is not expected to modify exploit mitigations or kernel integrity state.
